step_title: readonly diagnosis for BROADCAST_DELIVERED version skew
summary: 硬证据定位：community.py:545 读取的是 app.models.enums.EventType.BROADCAST_DELIVERED，定义文件是 myproject/app/models/enums.py。按当前 trusted broadcast 分支的本地直接调用关系，最小同步集合优先级为：enums.py、community.py、group_session.py、event_bus.py。
tests: read-only code trace: community.py import/use of EventType.BROADCAST_DELIVERED
read-only code trace: models/enums.py defines EventType.BROADCAST_DELIVERED = broadcast.delivered
read-only code trace: community.py trusted broadcast branch directly calls group_session.py and event_bus.py after line 545
